dict.string: Dynamo shows your upcoming events in the notch tray.
Dynamo shows your upcoming events in the notch tray.
Dynamo reads and updates your Apple Reminders in the Checklist tab so you can list, create, complete, and delete reminders from the notch.
Dynamo needs full Reminders access to read, create, complete, and delete reminders from the Checklist tab. Changes sync with the Reminders app.
Dynamo uses your location to show local weather in the notch. Location is sent only to Apple’s WeatherKit service to fetch the forecast; you can also set a location manually in Settings instead.
Dynamo can show a live camera mirror in the notch, including Continuity Camera (iPhone). The camera only runs while you have the Webcam tab open — never in the background.
Dynamo controls Music and Spotify for play/pause, skip, cover art, and playlists in the notch.
Dynamo samples audio from Music or Spotify to drive the notch equalizer to the beat and tone of what’s playing. Audio is analyzed on-device only and never recorded or sent anywhere.
Dynamo may use macOS audio capture permission to analyze music playback for the notch equalizer. Sound is processed on-device only and is never stored or uploaded.
